title: Algerian Chickpea Tagine
description: A classic North African stew from Algeria, made with tender chickpeas, fiery spices, and smoky flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay or ceramic pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the chickpeas, Algerian spices, harissa, smoked paprika, and dried apricots.
Stir to combine, then add 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve over couscous or rice.
